content.text:
All 7 tests pass with the existing implementation. No code change was needed because the implementation written for previous tests (specifically the generalized `nextGeneration` using the candidate-cell pattern with `isAliveNextGeneration`) already correctly handles the reproduction rule (dead cell with exactly 3 live neighbors becomes alive).

Green Phase Complete:
- Implementation: No change required. The existing `nextGeneration` in `/home/experimenter/experiments/runs/2026-05-10_11-31-08_game-of-life-example-mapping_v4-exact-subagents_opus-4-7/src/game-of-life.ts` already implements reproduction via `isAliveNextGeneration` returning true when `liveNeighborCount === 3`.
- Result: All 7 tests pass.
- Approach: This is the most minimal possible change — zero lines. The reproduction rule was already correctly generalized in a previous Green/Refactor cycle, so the new test passed immediately upon activation.

Proceeding to Refactor phase.
